name: Test Validation: Click buttons in the vision card before sign in.
description: This test verifies that a user, who is not signed in, sees the correct behavior after clicking on buttons in vision cards on the page.
descriptionHtml: This test verifies that a user, who is not signed in, sees the correct behavior after clicking on buttons in vision cards on the page.

testStage.description: This test verifies that a user, who is not signed in, sees the correct behavior after clicking on buttons in vision cards on the page.

steps.name: Navigating to the About Us page
Clicking the about us link in the header
Checking if the sign-in modal is displayed
Navigating to the About Us page
Clicking the about us link in the header
Checking if the sign-in modal is displayed
Navigating to the About Us page

Checking if Eco News page is opened
Navigating to the About Us page from Eco News page
Clicking the about us link in the header
Checking if the sign-in modal is displayed
Navigating to the About Us page
Clicking the about us link in the header
